signals.headline: Drift Protocol Hack | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 1, 2026, the Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked, with attackers withdrawing at least $280 million[5]. This was achieved through sophisticated social engineering targeting Drift Security Council members[5]. The incident could become one of the largest hacks in the industry[5].
